finding: `team start --execute --provider openai --runtime-mode real-agent` wrote an active run but executed zero roles unless every L1 role also received an explicit `--role-provider` override. The command then reported `ATM_TEAM_EXECUTION_BLOCKED` with `providerExecutionCount: 0`.
expectedBehavior: Top-level provider, SDK, model, and runtime options should become the default role selection when role overrides are absent; zero selected roles should fail before writing an active run.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0197: `cliGlobalDefault` / `cli-global-default` selection source populates every active roster role; regression `team-execute-defaults.spec.ts`.
followUp: Keep explicit `--role-provider` overrides above the global CLI default.
